evidence: Diff summary: production-disabled VTuber referral MVP; public /vtuber/<slug> page; referral campaign API and share kit; signup and onboarding attribution handoff; profile referral fields; post-first-log Premium CTA; docs, OpenAPI, OKF, runbook, and tests.
open_issues: Scope deviation is intentionally recorded: oshi-note PR #506 bundles runtime referral page, signup/onboarding attribution, profile fields, and Premium CTA work that PPEP-ON-VPR-001 originally scoped out. Delivery tracking must not auto-close PR-ON-VPR-001 from this receipt; planning artifacts should be split or backfilled for PR-ON-VPR-002 and PR-ON-VPR-006 coverage.

scope_disposition.summary: PR #506 is a merged oshi-note implementation receipt with broader scope than the source PPEP-ON-VPR-001 policy-only handoff. It records evidence for the merged target PR but is not a clean completion receipt for PR-ON-VPR-001.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: productionでは明示flagなしでVTuber referral surfaceを無効にする
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: PR #506 adds VTUBER_REFERRAL_FEATURE_ENABLED gating; tests include production default-off and explicit disable cases; PR body records production disabled release state.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: publishable campaignのみ /vtuber/<slug> と公開APIで表示する
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: src/application/vtuber_referral.py validates verified_status=verified, material_permission_status=permitted, public_page_enabled=true; tests cover pending, invalid JSON, and string false.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: 紹介ページからsignup/login/onboardingへcampaign contextを引き継ぐ
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: templates/vtuber_referral.html, templates/login.html, and static/features/onboarding/referral.js store and apply low-cardinality referral context; JS and API tests cover prefill and attribution.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: profile attributionは低カーディナリティtokenだけを保存し、非公開情報を紹介元へ共有しない
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: src/domain/entities/profile.py and src/presentation/routes.py store referral_source, referral_campaign_id, referral_creator_slug only; PR review packet and tests cover invalid/unpublishable attribution rejection.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: first log後のPremium CTAをreferral user向けに表示する
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: static/features/home/index.js and static/features/billing/plan-copy.js add vtuber_referral_after_first_log context; JS tests verify CTA mount and plan copy.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: PR表示、本人確認、素材許諾、YouTube/Twitch API Data scope outをdocs/specに残す
acceptance_criteria_status.evidence: docs/spec/vtuber-referral-pr-page.md, docs/spec/vtuber-partner-verification.md, docs/spec/vtuber-material-permission.md, docs/spec/vtuber-pr-disclosure.md, and docs/runbooks/vtuber-partner-intake.md were added.

security_privacy_legal_review: PR #506 records Functional QA PASS and Security QA PASS. The implementation gates production exposure behind VTUBER_REFERRAL_FEATURE_ENABLED, publishes only verified/permitted/enabled campaigns, rejects direct API attribution for disabled or unpublishable campaigns, stores only low-cardinality referral tokens on profiles, keeps normal memo content private, and documents PR/material/API-data boundaries.
rollback_plan: Set VTUBER_REFERRAL_FEATURE_ENABLED=false to disable referral pages, public campaign APIs, signup attribution handoff, and profile referral attribution acceptance. If code rollback is required, revert merge commit b0ef34d61a81748a6bcfcc3a5b8012507bc14440.
notes: PR #506 was merged on 2026-06-26T05:21:51Z into develop. Merge commit: b0ef34d61a81748a6bcfcc3a5b8012507bc14440. Source packet planned_pr_id is PR-ON-VPR-001; user request used alias PPR-ON-VPR-001 and compact program/epic aliases PROGRAM-ON-VPR-001 / EPIC-ON-VPR-001, while FDA source artifacts currently use PROGRAM-OSHI-VTUBER-PR-001 / EPIC-OSHI-VTUBER-PR-6A. Because this target PR includes implementation work that PPEP-ON-VPR-001 scoped out, consumers must treat this as a deviation receipt requiring manual tracking review rather than an automatic closure signal for PR-ON-VPR-001.
